Manage_Scheduler_Jobs_Table.description: Table of all batch jobs. Per-row interactive elements: Is Active toggle and editable CRON expression. Global control to start/stop scheduler.

Start_Stop_Scheduler.on_change: controls whether scheduled jobs execute globally

Global_Configuration_Table.description: System-wide feature flags and configuration values.

Value.description: editable value field (type varies by configuration)

Manage_Codes_Table.description: Lists all code lists. Clicking a row opens the code values detail view where entries can be added, edited, reordered, or deactivated.

Code_List_Detail.description: Detail view for a code list. Supports adding, editing, reordering, and deactivating entries that populate dropdowns system-wide.

Manage_Data_Tables_Table.description: Lists custom data tables that extend core entities (rows represent custom tables).

Create_Data_Table_Form.description: Form to create a new custom data table with column definitions.

Audit_Trails_Table.description: Displays system actions with filters. When maker-checker is enabled, pending commands expose Approve/Reject actions.

items.on_success: terminates authenticated session; clears authentication token; redirects to login page

Authenticated_Route_Guard.description: Global guard applied to all authenticated routes. After logout, attempts to navigate to an authenticated page will trigger this guard and redirect to the login page.
